rule.name: Insecure Local Storage of Secrets
rule.rule_desc: Detects local persistence patterns where sensitive value handling should be verified.
rule.vuln_desc: Improper secret storage can expose credentials or tokens to local compromise.
rule.developer: Use secure storage APIs for secrets and avoid plaintext persistence in app preferences.
rule.reviewer: Inspect storage calls to ensure only non-sensitive values use preference stores.

rule.name: TLS Certificate Validation Bypass Callback
rule.rule_desc: Detects explicit certificate validation bypass in HTTP client configuration.
rule.vuln_desc: Bypassing certificate validation enables man-in-the-middle interception.
rule.developer: Use default certificate validation or robust pinning with proper fallback handling.
rule.reviewer: Verify no certificate callback unconditionally returns true.

rule.name: WebView JavaScript Enabled
rule.rule_desc: Detects potentially risky web view JavaScript configuration in Xamarin apps.
rule.vuln_desc: Untrusted content rendered with active scripting can lead to data exposure and injection-like abuse.
rule.developer: Restrict origins and disable JavaScript unless necessary.
rule.reviewer: Check WebView source restrictions and script execution requirements.

rule.name: Android Backup Enabled
rule.rule_desc: Detects Android backup configuration that can expose local app data.
rule.vuln_desc: Backups may leak sensitive app data if not encrypted or excluded.
rule.developer: Disable backups for sensitive apps or explicitly exclude sensitive data.
rule.reviewer: Validate backup policy based on data sensitivity and compliance requirements.

rule.name: iOS Keychain Accessibility Too Broad
rule.rule_desc: Detects permissive keychain accessibility constants in iOS-specific Xamarin code.
rule.vuln_desc: Weak keychain accessibility can increase exposure of stored secrets.
rule.developer: Use stricter keychain accessibility constants aligned with runtime requirements.
rule.reviewer: Review keychain configuration and enforce least-privilege accessibility.
